quotes: Apply the palette in the **primary > secondary > tertiary ratio** shown in the guide: blues and golds dominate; tertiary colors are accents and surfaces.

rules.intent: Maintain the established visual weight and hierarchical balance of brand colors.
rules.rule_text: Apply the palette in the primary > secondary > tertiary ratio: blues and golds dominate, while tertiary colors are reserved for accents and surfaces.

quotes: Headlines/headings: Brand Blue (or White on dark/gradient backgrounds).
Body text: Graphite #212121 on light backgrounds; White on dark backgrounds
**Headlines/headings:** Brand Blue (or White on dark/gradient backgrounds).
**Body text:** Graphite #212121 on light backgrounds; White on dark backgrounds (with increased line height, §1.2).

rules.intent: Ensure text contrast and legibility across light and dark backgrounds.
rules.rule_text: Headlines use Brand Blue (headline.color = #00529b) or White (#ffffff) on dark/gradient backgrounds. Body text uses Graphite (body.color = #212121) on light backgrounds or White (#ffffff) on dark backgrounds (with increased line height).

quotes: Sunshine/Gold strictly reserved for emphasizing key figures
**Charts/about:blank** Brand Blue + Sky Blue dominant; **Sunshine/Gold strictly reserved for emphasizing key figures**; gray for placebo.

rules.intent: Standardize chart semantics to make key data highlights immediate.
rules.rule_text: In charts, Brand Blue (#00529b) and Sky Blue (#358CCB) must dominate; Sunshine Amber Orange (color.primary.sunshine = #faa31b) or Gold (color.primary.gold = #ffc60a) are strictly reserved for emphasizing key figures, and gray is used for placebo.

quotes: Light Blue at 70% tint (data callouts); Golden Sand at 30% tint (text-heavy callouts)
**Callout surfaces:** Light Blue at 70% tint (data callouts); Golden Sand at 30% tint (text-heavy callouts).

rules.intent: Maintain structural color coding for diverse layout cards.
rules.rule_text: Callout surfaces must use Light Blue (#E6F0F9) at 70% opacity (opacity.callout.70 = 0.7) for data callouts, and Golden Sand (#FEF1C8) at 30% opacity (opacity.callout.golden_sand_box = 0.3) for text-heavy callouts.

quotes: never for primary CTAs, headlines, or data
**Coral:** sparing tertiary accent only — never for primary CTAs, headlines, or data. **[GENERAL]:** avoid Coral in email sections unless the brief calls for it.

rules.intent: Restrict the high-contrast accent color to maintain editorial focus and hierarchy.
rules.rule_text: Coral (color.tertiary.coral = #F26A38) must be used only as a sparing tertiary accent; it must never be used for primary CTAs, headlines, or data. Avoid using Coral in email sections unless explicitly required by the creative brief.

quotes: Brand Blue #00529b, underlined, on light backgrounds; White underlined on dark
**Links [GENERAL]:** Brand Blue #00529b, underlined, on light backgrounds; White underlined on dark.

rules.intent: Ensure link visibility and consistent click signifiers across all themes.
rules.rule_text: Links must be underlined and use Brand Blue (body.link.color = #00529b) on light backgrounds, and White (#ffffff) on dark backgrounds.

quotes: 70% transparency of Pantone 7548 C / #ffc60a must be maintained in all instances
The logo icon's **70% transparency of Pantone 7548 C / #ffc60a must be maintained in all instances** (logo, and when the mark is used as a pattern/graphic).

rules.intent: Ensure consistent legal representation of brand assets.
rules.rule_text: The logo icon's 70% transparency (opacity.logo.gold = 0.7) of Gold (#ffc60a) must be maintained in all instances, including when the logo mark is used as a pattern or design graphic.
